case_title: DEGREGORIO, TRACY vs. GADDI, ANTONIO et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-18-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY GREGORY M HAYNES. HEARING SET FOR JUL-28-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-01-2000, TO FILE POS; TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY HAYNES GREGORY, WHO IS REQURIED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-16-2000 CONTINUED FROM MAR-01-2000 TO MAY-17-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
